title: Enforcer (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:GauvianEnforcer.png|thumb|right|250px|A Guavian Enforcer carrying a micro grenade launcher]]
'''Enforcer''' could refer to several things:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''''[[Enforcer]]''''', a [[Star Destroyer]].
*'''[[Enforcer (occupation)|Enforcers]]''', [[soldier]]s who served criminal factions.
*'''[[NR-N99 Persuader-class droid enforcer|NR-N99 ''Persuader''-class droid enforcer]]''', a [[droid tank]] used by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems]].
*'''[[Enforcer Squadron]]''', a [[Alpha-3 Nimbus-class V-wing starfighter|Alpha-3 ''Nimbus''-class V-wing starfighter]] squadron of the [[Galactic Republic]]
*'''[[Guavian security soldier|Guavian Enforcer]]''', the security soldiers of the [[Guavian Death Gang]] 

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===Capital ships===
*'''[[Enforcer-class picket cruiser|''Enforcer''-class picket cruiser]]''', a class of ships in the [[Pentastar Alignment|Imperial starfleet]].
*'''''[[Enforcer (Neutron Star-class)|Enforcer]]''''', a [[Neutron Star-class bulk cruiser/Legends|''Neutron Star''-class bulk cruiser]].
*'''''[[Enforcer (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|Enforcer]]''''', an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]].
*'''''[[Enforcer (Executor-class)|Enforcer]]''''', an [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]].
*'''''[[Enforcer One]]''''', the name of two ships.

===Other vehicles===
*'''[[KE-8 Enforcer]]'''
*'''[[All Terrain Tactical Enforcer/Legends|All Terrain Tactical Enforcer]]'''
*'''[[All Terrain Heavy Enforcer/Legends|All Terrain Heavy Enforcer]]'''
*'''[[NR-N99 Persuader-class droid enforcer/Legends|NR-N99 ''Persuader''-class droid enforcer]]'''''
*'''[[Sith Enforcer]]'''

===Other===
*'''[[.48-caliber Enforcer pistol|Enforcer]]''', a model of projectile pistol.
*'''[[K5 Enforcer Droid]]'''
*'''[[Bogga's enforcer gang]]''', a group affiliated with [[Bogga|Bogga the Hutt]].

{{Disambig}}
